entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor (L.) Moench, the crop studied for diastatic activity

entities.name: DIASTATIC ACTIVITY
entities.description: The enzymatic activity in grain sorghum measured in SDU per gram of malt

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The ability of parents to produce offspring with superior traits

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The superiority of hybrids over their parents for a specific trait

entities.name: MUZARABANI, ZIMBABWE
entities.description: The site where the sorghum entries were grown

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The environmental period during which the crops were grown

entities.name: SORGHUM DIASTIC UNITS
entities.description: The unit of measurement for diastatic activity in sorghum

entities.name: NON-ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: The genetic mechanism primarily responsible for variation in diastatic activity

entities.name: GENERAL COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The average effect of a parent in combining with other parents

entities.name: SPECIFIC COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The deviation of a specific cross from the expected general combining ability

entities.name: RECURRENT SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding procedure suggested to improve diastatic activity by developing elite parents

entities.name: 4HA85S
entities.description: A sorghum line that exhibited high positive general combining ability effects

entities.name: 120A
entities.description: A sorghum tester that exhibited high positive general combining ability effects

entities.name: 120A X D 38073-2
entities.description: A sorghum hybrid that showed significant positive specific combining ability and high parent heterosis
